title: Another 32bit version error: node has no back
body:
---


Author Name: **Mark Jackson Pulver**
Original Redmine Issue: 670 from https://www.veripool.org
Original Date: 2013-08-20
Original Assignee: Wilson Snyder (@wsnyder)

---

version 3_851 fails make test on 32bit Ubuntu machine:
```
> make[2]: Entering directory `/tmp/etools/verilator/test_sc'
> /usr/bin/perl /tmp/etools/verilator/test_sc/../bin/verilator             --sc -f /tmp/etools/verilator/test_sc/../test_v/input.vc top.v --trace
> %Error: Internal Error: ../V3Ast.cpp:485: Node has no back, already unlinked?
> %Error: Internal Error: See the manual and http://www.veripool.org/verilator for more assistance.
> %Error: Command Failed /tmp/etools/verilator/test_sc/../verilator_bin --sc -f /tmp/etools/verilator/test_sc/../test_v/input.vc top.v --trace
> make[2]: *** [prep] Error 10

```

Install and test worked fine on a 64bit kernel.
code_blocks:

> /usr/bin/perl /tmp/etools/verilator/test_sc/../bin/verilator             --sc -f /tmp/etools/verilator/test_sc/../test_v/input.vc top.v --trace
